question: Will Elon Musk become a trillionaire before July 2026?
reason: Elon Musk's net worth is estimated at $676 billion as of May 20, 2026.
evidence: Bloomberg Billionaires Index lists Musk's net worth at $676 billion as of May 20, 2026. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/billionaires/?utm_source=openai))

Forbes Real-Time Billionaires estimates Musk's net worth at $782 billion as of May 1, 2026. ([forbes.com](https://www.forbes.com/sites/forbeswealthteam/article/the-top-ten-richest-people-in-the-world/?ctpv=xlrecirc&utm_source=openai))

Musk's wealth is primarily tied to Tesla and SpaceX, with Tesla's market cap at $1.6 trillion and SpaceX's valuation between $1.75 and $2 trillion.
